name: Crunchy Potato Chip Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
3. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in the salt and vanilla extract. Add the pecans and potato chips, mixing well.
4. Using a wooden spoon, stir in the flour just until combined. Roll the batter into balls about the size of a large walnut and place them on the cookie sheet, leaving plenty of room for spreading.
5. Dip each ball into melted butter, then into granulated sugar to coat. Press and twist to flatten slightly into 3-inch circles.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the edges turn lightly golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
7. Drizzle the cooled cookies with melted chocolate. Refrigerate to set.
